tools.name: compress_markdown
tools.description: Compress markdown text by removing decorative structure (badges, HTML wrappers, table formatting). Returns compressed text with token statistics. Lossless on semantic content.

tools.name: estimate_savings
tools.description: Estimate token savings from markdown compression without producing compressed output. Returns original and compressed token counts, savings percentage, and a recommendation.

markdown.description: The markdown text to estimate savings for
